chunks.text: ORDER SHEET INTHE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Misc. Appln. No.. S- 161 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon'ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No.2443 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No.2444 of 2022. 4.For orders on M.A No.24450g 2022. 5.For hearing of main case. 15.6.2022. Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, advocate alongwith the applicant. 63 1 2..Granted..Overruled. 3..Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for the applicant states that although the instant criminal miscellaneous application has been filed, on account of being unaware of the date fixed in the proceedings before the Magistrate, the request is made for conversion of this application under Section 498 Cr.P.C for protective bail. The request so made not hampered by law is entertained. Without touching merits or demerits of the case, applicant AsgharAli is admitted to protective bail for sevendays to appearbefore the concerned Court in Crime No.11 of 2022, registered at Police Station Kamber City under Sections 201, 223, 225-A, 225-B, 175, 166-A PPC. subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fify thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile, the N.B.Ws issued by the concerned Magistrate against the applicant shall remain suspended. This order shall seize to operate after seven days or on the day when applicat surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier.
